title: Delicate Korean Salmon Sushi
description: A citrusy and adventurous Canadian dish featuring perilla-leaf-kkaennip, nigiri-shaping, and pescatarian-friendly ingredients, this delicate Korean salmon sushi is a unique twist on traditional sushi.

ingredients.name: Japanese short-grain rice
ingredients.notes: cooked and seasoned with rice vinegar

instructions: Prepare the sushi rice according to the package instructions and season with rice vinegar, sugar, and salt.
Cut the salmon fillet into thin slices and set aside.
Prepare the perilla leaves by washing and drying them, then cutting them into thin strips.
Assemble the sushi by laying a norii sheet flat and spreading a thin layer of sushi rice onto it.
Place a few pieces of salmon in the middle of the rice, then add a few strips of perilla leaf on top.
Roll the sushi using a bamboo sushi mat and apply gentle pressure to form a compact roll.
Repeat the process until all the ingredients are used up, then slice the rolls into individual pieces.
Drizzle the sushi with lemon juice and sesame oil, then sprinkle with sesame seeds.
